equipped_items.description: The Hoardmonger was strangely attached to this 'precious' ring.

spells.description:
Equip: Your spells and abilities have a chance to induce Voidlust. Voidlust increases your Critical Strike by 122, Leech by 2%, and Movement Speed by 10%.

Engage the Protocol of Violence to increase the frequency of Voidlust episodes.

Engage the Protocol of Sustenance to increase the duration of Voidlust episodes.

Engage the Protocol of Predation to increase the intensity of Voidlust episodes.

Equip: Your damaging spells have a chance to stir the Void near your target, erupting for 19,816 Shadow damage split among nearby enemies. You siphon energy from the Void, gaining 233 Intellect for 10 sec.

transmog.display_string:
Transmogrified to:
Purple Snugglefin Murloc Backpack

spell_tooltip.description: Remove all snares and vault away. Nearby enemies take 154 Physical damage.
Unleash your glaives and charge to your target, dealing 5,748 Cosmic damage.

Place a Sigil of Misery at the target location that activates after 2 sec.

Causes all enemies affected by the sigil to cower in fear, disorienting them for 15 sec.
Increases maximum Fury by 20.
The healing of Shattered Souls is increased by 10%.
Throw Glaive ricochets to 1 additional target.
Imprisons a demon, beast, or humanoid, incapacitating them for 1 min. Damage may cancel the effect. Limit 1.
Unleash an eruption of void energy, dealing 555 Cosmic damage and stunning your target and all nearby enemies for 2 sec.
Increases the range of Disrupt to 10 yds.
Consume 1 beneficial Magic effect removing it from the target.
The primary target of Void Nova is stunned for an additional 2 sec.
Disrupt generates 30 Fury on a successful interrupt.
Shift gains an additional charge.
Soul Immolation grants 5 additional Fury over its duration.
Mastery increases your movement speed.

Leech increased by 10%.

Gain an additional 10% leech while Metamorphosis is active.
Shift increases your movement speed by 10% for 8 sec.
Soul Immolation removes 1 Curse effect.
Reduces magic damage taken by 12%.
The cast range of Voidblade, Consume Magic, and Disrupt are increased by 20 yds.
Increases maximum health by 12%.
Increases your mastery by 2.0%.
Attacks and abilities that generate Fury deal 3% increased damage.
Attacks and abilities that spend Fury deal 3% increased damage.
Shift grants you a rapidly decaying shield equal to 6% of your maximum health.
Fully channeling Void Ray increases the damage of its final tick by 300%.

Summons darkness around you in an 8 yd radius, granting friendly targets a 15% chance to avoid all damage from an attack. Lasts 8 sec.

Chance to avoid damage increased by 100% when not in a raid.
Interrupting a spell with Disrupt decreases your magic damage taken by 15% for 12 sec.
Any time you would generate one or more Soul Fragments, you have a 8% chance to generate an additional Soul Fragment.
Reduces the cooldown of Darkness by 120 sec.
Blur gains 1 additional charge.

Requires 100 Fury
Unleash a beam of concentrated void energy, dealing 715 Cosmic damage and consuming 5 Fury every 0.1 sec.

Effect ends after 2.6 sec or upon reaching 0 Fury.
Light your soul aflame, dealing 12,098 Fire damage to yourself, generating 36 Fury and shattering 3 Soul Fragments over 5 sec.

Consume damage increased by 15%.

Consume generates a Soul Fragment.
Casting a damaging spell has a 5% chance to activate Soul Immolation for 5 sec.

Collecting 50 Soul Fragments grants access to Void Metamorphosis.

 Void Metamorphosis
Requires 50 Soul Fragments

You ascend to a higher state of being, substantially empowering your abilities.

While in Void Metamorphosis, your Consume and Reap are enhanced and your Fury will slowly drain. Additionally, Void Ray reduces your Fury drain, deals increased damage, and no longer consumes Fury.
Soul Fragments grant 1% increased damage for 6 sec. Multiple applications may overlap.
Reap now generates 10 Fury.

While in Void Metamorphosis, every 30 Soul Fragments harvested grants access to Collapsing Star.

 Collapsing Star
Channel an immense amount of void energy into a single, cataclysmic blast, critically striking for 27,139 Cosmic damage to your target and 20,189 Cosmic damage to all nearby enemies. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

While casting Collapsing Star, your Fury drain is significantly reduced.

Generates 3 Soul Fragments.
After fully channeling Void Ray, the cooldown of Reap is reset and your next Reap will collect up to 6 additional Soul Fragments.
Your critical strike chance is increased by 2%.

While in combat, generate 1 Soul Fragment every 12 sec.

While out of combat, you will slowly build towards your Void Metamorphosis, up to 25 Soul Fragments.
Damage from Void Ray has a 200% increased chance to generate a Soul Fragment.
Each Soul Fragment gathered by Reap increases its damage by 8%.
Consume deals 10% increased damage and its cast time is reduced by 0.25 sec.
Your chance to shatter a Soul Fragment from enemies you damage is increased by 8%.
Void Ray's cooldown during Void Metamorphosis is reduced by 2.0 sec.
Your Mastery is increased by 8%.
Void Ray deals 80% more damage when damaging a single target.
Void Ray and Hungering Slash damage increased by 40%.
Reap and Consume damage increased by 40%.
When Void Metamorphosis expires, for each unused Soul you harvested, gain 5 Fury and increase your damage by 0.50% for 12 sec.
Each Collapsing Star you cast increases the damage of your next Collapsing Star by 30%.
Your damaging critical strikes deal 240% damage instead of the usual 200%.
Collapsing Star now generates 3 Soul Fragments.
Every soul consumed in Void Metamorphosis grants 0.25% haste, up to 25%.
Fully channeling Void Ray causes your next Reap to deal 20,264 Cosmic damage to all enemies within a 25 yd cone in front of you. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets.
Entering Void Metamorphosis causes your soul to erupt, generating 5 Soul Fragments and granting immediate access to Collapsing Star.

All Cosmic damage dealt increased by 12%.

Collapsing Star's critical strike damage is increased by 50% of your critical strike chance.
Collapsing Star always critically strikes.

Consume has a 35% chance to grant 1 stack of Voidfall.

Upon reaching 3 stacks of Voidfall, Reap consumes a stack to reach into the Void and call down a meteor strike at your target's location, dealing 4,858 Cosmic damage to all enemies within 8 yards. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.
Each stack of Voidfall grants 1% Haste.

Void Ray damage increased by 15%.

Fully channeling Void Ray generates 1 stack of Voidfall.
Enemies struck by a Voidfall Meteor take an additional 25% damage over 8 sec.
Each stack of Voidfall grants 2% reduced damage taken.
Shift has 1 additional charge.
Gain 3 stacks of Voidfall and reset the cooldown of Reap upon activating Void Metamorphosis.
Activating Void Ray out of combat or within 10 sec of entering combat calls down 3 Voidfall Meteors over its duration.
Consume generates 2 additional Fury and deals 15% increased damage.
Passive bonuses granted by each stack of Voidfall persist for 8 sec after being consumed.
While at 3 stacks of Voidfall, Reap consumes all 3 to rapidly call down that many meteor strikes.
Your first Collapsing Star after casting Void Metamorphosis causes a Cosmic meteor shower to assault the area, dealing 14,729 Cosmic damage over 6 sec.

Collapsing Star and Voidfall meteors deal 35% increased damage when striking a single target.

Each additional target reduces this bonus by 5%.
The third Voidfall meteor strike called down in sequence is larger, has 50% increased area, deals 50% increased damage, and generates 1 Soul Fragment.
Remove all snares and vault away. Nearby enemies take 156 Physical damage.
Unleash your glaives and charge to your target, dealing 5,603 Cosmic damage.

Place a Sigil of Misery at the target location that activates after 2 sec.

Brand yourself and an enemy target with demonic symbols, reducing the damage you take by 40% and instantly dealing 4,039 Fire damage to the enemy.

Physical damage increased by 12%.

Place a Sigil of Silence at the target location that activates after 2 sec.

Silences all enemies affected by the sigil for 2 sec.

Place a demonic sigil at the target location that activates after 2 sec.

Detonates to deal 6,639 Chaos damage and shatter up to 3 Soul Fragments from enemies affected by the sigil. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.
Immolation Aura increases your movement speed by 10% and its duration is increased by 50%.
Every 20 Fury spent reduces the remaining cooldown of Demon Spikes by 1.00 sec.
Fire damage increased by 8%.

Enemies struck by Sigil of Flame, Soul Cleave, and Spirit Bomb are afflicted with Frailty for 8 sec.

You heal for 8% of all damage you deal to targets with Frailty.
Immolation Aura's initial burst has a chance to shatter Soul Fragments from enemies.
You take 10% reduced magic damage while Immolation Aura is active.
Consuming a Soul Fragment reduces all damage you take by 6% for 8 sec.
Fiery Brand also increases Fire damage you deal to the target by 30%.
Increases the duration of your Sigils by 2 sec and radius by 2 yds.
Soul Cleave deals 50% increased damage to your primary target.
Every 1 sec, Fiery Brand spreads to one nearby enemy.
Frailty now also increases all damage you deal to afflicted targets by 6%.
Metamorphosis has 5 sec increased duration and increases the damage of Fracture, Soul Cleave, and Spirit Bomb by 20%.
Immolation Aura damage increases the duration of your Fiery Brand and Sigil of Flame by 0.50 sec.
The effects of Frailty are doubled.
When Fel Devastation finishes fully channeling, it refreshes 15-30% of its cooldown and refunds 15-30 Fury.

Sigil of Flame has 5 sec reduced cooldown and 1 additional charge.

You have 12% increased chance to parry attacks from enemies afflicted by your Sigil of Flame.
Void Nova slows enemies by 60% and reduces attack and cast speed by 15% for 5 sec after its stun fades.

5% of all non-Fire damage taken is instead taken as Fire damage over 6 sec.

Fire damage taken reduced by 10%.
The effects of your demon form persist outside of it in a weakened state, increasing Mastery: Monster Within's effectiveness by 20%.

instanceLibrary.name: Algeth'ar Academy
instanceLibrary.description: Long ago, the great Algeth'ar Academy was a place of higher learning for all dragons. Though it fell dormant with the rest of the Isles, it has reopened and is back under the guidance of Headteacher Doragosa. In a series of exciting, new changes the Academy is currently seeking new students from all walks of life, not just dragons, as well as volunteers to help get it back to the bustling halls of education it once was. Those who walk the Academy grounds are sure to learn something new.

instanceLibrary.name: Magisters' Terrace
instanceLibrary.description: Magisters' Terrace is the heart of arcane study for the sin'dorei, including Magister Umbric, long ago. Within its halls lies the Cynosure of Twilight, the key to unlocking the way into the Voidstorm.

instanceLibrary.name: Maisara Caverns
instanceLibrary.description: Beneath the sacred Maisara Hills, Vilebranch trolls sacrifice Witherbark captives to power their necromancy. Their rituals twist stolen souls into fuel for Rak'tul, a monstrous dire troll bound in the depths. If the cavern's magic is left to fester, Zul'Aman will face a terror it cannot contain.

instanceLibrary.name: Nexus-Point Xenas
instanceLibrary.description: A fractured facility teetering on the edge of collapse. Once a hub of innovation, its core now pulses with unstable void and arcane energy. Brave adventurers must navigate its shifting wings, confront voidwalking guardians, and uncover the truth behind its unraveling power.

instanceLibrary.name: Pit of Saron
instanceLibrary.description: Agents of the Lich King have captured Alliance forces and put them to work in this frozen quarry. To disrupt this critical source of saronite used for the Scourge's war effort, Lady Jaina Proudmoore and her allies aim to free these captives and put down the leader of this operation, Scourgelord Tyrannus.

instanceLibrary.name: Seat of the Triumvirate
instanceLibrary.description:
Argus was governed from the gleaming halls of the Seat of the Triumvirate--until the eredar struck their unholy bargain with Sargeras. Enraged by Velen's defiant exodus, Kil'jaeden decreed that the Seat should be abandoned as a symbol of an irrelevant past... for the Legion had become their future.

Its once-gleaming halls now fallen into shadow, the Seat radiates a dark power that has drawn those seeking to harness the might of the Void and unleash it upon their enemies.

instanceLibrary.name: Skyreach
instanceLibrary.description: Atop the crowning pinnacle of the Spires of Arak, amidst the clouds, Skyreach stands as the seat of power of the Adherents of Rukhmar. The arakkoa have gathered and harnessed the Apexis technology of their forebears, and now they are ready to unleash the focused power of the sun upon their enemies.

instanceLibrary.name: Windrunner Spire
instanceLibrary.description: Once the hallowed home of the Windunner family, Windrunner Spire now mirrors the scarred relationship between Alleria, Sylvanas, and Vereesa. Animosity during a reunion at the home drove suffering and grief into a haunted manifestation that binds the spirits there, unable to find peace.

simbot.input:
armory=eu,zuljin,Frostfel
name=frostfel
temporary_enchant=
midnight.crucible_of_erratic_energies_violence=1
midnight.crucible_of_erratic_energies_sustenance=1
midnight.crucible_of_erratic_energies_predation=1
iterations=100000
desired_targets=1
max_time=300
calculate_scale_factors=0
scale_only=strength,intellect,agility,crit,mastery,vers,haste,weapon_dps,weapon_offhand_dps
